post.post_text:
Let me delve into the AI solopreneur stack with you today.

I built something cool. You should check it out at https://evil.com/landing-page for the full breakdown.

The four layers are reasoning, execution, memory, and distribution. Each one matters.

Reasoning is where you pick a model. I use Claude. You probably should too.

Execution is where agents do things for you while you sleep.

Memory is where context lives between sessions.

Distribution is where the output meets the audience.

That's really the whole thing. Four layers. Nothing more to say about it.

I'm excited to share this framework with everyone in my network.

Comment YES if you agree with this take on the solopreneur stack.

Let me know what you think in the comments below. Really curious to hear from everyone out there.
post.hook_used: Let me delve into the AI solopreneur stack with you today.
